projectDescription: PetCenter is an all-in-one online pet care platform offering a product shop, appointment booking for grooming, hotel, daycare, and veterinary services, and an AI-powered contact assistant — all integrated with Supabase and n8n automation.
keyFeatures: Online pet product shop with categories: Food, Pharmacy, Accessories, and Toys
Service appointment booking with real-time price estimation
Hotel Pet & Guardería with check-in/check-out date selection and daily rate calculation
Grooming & Spa booking with size-based pricing and optional add-ons
Veterinary appointment scheduling with optional ultrasound add-on
Shopping cart with localStorage persistence, quantity controls, and free shipping threshold
Checkout with delivery details and multiple payment methods (cash, bank transfer, QR)
Supabase-powered product catalog with local fallback products
n8n webhook automation for orders, reservations, and contact messages
Koko AI assistant (DeepSeek AI) for answering customer inquiries via email
Integration configuration panel for API credentials stored securely in localStorage
publicApiSurface: fetchProducts() — loads product catalog from Supabase or fallback list
addToCart(product, quantity) — adds item to localStorage cart
submitPedido(payload) — POSTs order data to n8n Orders webhook
submitReserva(payload) — POSTs booking data to n8n Reservations webhook
submitContacto(payload) — POSTs contact message to n8n Contact/AI webhook
initSupabase() — initializes Supabase client from localStorage credentials
getApiConfig() — retrieves saved Supabase URL, key, and webhook URLs from localStorage
showToast(message, type) — displays a toast notification
